form.formComment: Comes off a 29 day let-up. At the latest run raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Ipswich F&M Bm62 on March 14 over 1100m, 2.75 len behind Take Achance On Me carrying 60kg at $3.50. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Eagle Farm Cl3 on February 28 over 1000m, slow going 4 len behind Galactic Star with 55kg at $16. Encouraging effort last start. Right in this contest.

form.formComment: Last start 7th of 12 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Angel Ladder carrying 54.5kg at $14. Before that won by 0.9 len at Gold Coast F&M 0 - 58 March 7 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Marathia with 59.5kg at $2.70. Should be at her top now and is a definite top-three chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out in the home straight.
Bumped with Earn To Burn approaching the 800m and became unbalanced.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months from last on the turn 5th of 9 at Doomben Cl1 on March 11 over 1200m, slow going 2.5 len behind Bollinger Miss carrying 54.5kg at $16. Previously second-up 6th of 12 at Doomben Cl1 on December 12 over 1350m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Barrelling carrying 57kg at $11. Is a second-up winner in the past and is among the genuine chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Reared as the start was effected and lost ground.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of four-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign won by 2.25 len Donald 4yo+ Mdn-Sw December 2 over 1350m defeating Adamana carrying 57.5kg at $2.40. Previously first up; second of 12 at Sale Mdn-Sw August 17 over 1100m, 0.8 len behind Unifies with 57.5kg at $2.20. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up from the 400m until approaching the 200m.
Brushed at the start by Lets Recover and shifted in.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd of 9 at this track Bm60 on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 1.5 len behind Little Vista carrying 57kg at $8.50. The run before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Ipswich F&M Bm62 on March 14 over 1100m, 1.1 len behind Take Achance On Me carrying 55.5kg at $4.80. Well placed and sure to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide. When shifting wider rounding the home turn, bumped with Jaggery.
Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at this track Cl1-Sw October 24 over 1400m, 4 len behind Trapedo carrying 58kg at $11. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len Doomben Mdn-Sw June 11 over 1200m defeating Valencia Roc carrying 56kg at $7. Resumes after a recent trial win. Expecting a strong run while fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping. Over raced for a short distance near the 900m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation second last of 9 at this track F&M Cl1 December 20 over 1200m, 7 len behind Home Zone with 55kg at $12. Previously first up; fifth of 10 at this track Cl1 December 5 over 1000m, 2 len behind Over Draft carrying 54kg at $31. Might be better off following this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 200m when weakening, steadied from the heels of Data Scramble.
Raced wide. Raced ungenerously when placed under pressure in the home straight.
Over the concluding stages, shifted out under pressure.
When placed under pressure in the home straight, laid out.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 36 days. Resuming sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Lismore Cl1 on February 10 over 1120m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Tribbiani with 55kg at $10. Second run from a spell raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 7 at Gold Coast F&M 0 - 58 on March 7 over 1000m, slow going 6 len behind Unfaithful carrying 59.5kg at $12. Needs to improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Near the 850m, obliged to steady when racing keenly.
Began awkwardly, and shifted out making contact with Minor Key.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 4th of 10 at Gold Coast Poly Bm55 on March 28 over 1050m, 1.5 len behind Call To Courage carrying 54.5kg at $26. Previously second-up second last of 8 at Gatton Bm60 on October 16 over 860m, 5 len behind Dawyn's Choice with 56.5kg at $10. Maybe a place.

form.formComment: At the latest run got back early 7th of 10 at Ipswich Cl2 on March 26 over 1100m, 3 len behind Capital Heart carrying 54kg at $151. Before that settled well back; won by a long-neck at Kilcoy F&M 0 - 58 March 17 over 1200m in soft going defeating Elizabass carrying 54kg at $9. Doesn't appeal.
